response: This email from DevOps alerts recipients that the SSL certificate for api.company.com will expire in 7 days on May 4, as its automatic renewal failed due to a DNS validation issue that arose when the required CNAME record for the domain was removed during a recent DNS migration. DevOps plans to resolve the issue the same day the alert was sent by re-adding the missing CNAME record _acme-challenge.api.company.com, and only flagged the problem to keep relevant stakeholders informed of the temporary risk to the service.
